title: GitHub Review by gndrmnn
summary: The reviewer wants the architectural deviation log table removed from README.md, since it's a user-facing file and shouldn't contain internal architectural decisions. Keeping it would also create an ongoing maintenance burden to stay in sync with the code.

code_comments.body:
Remove deviation log from README.md

This file is meant for users and should not include architectural deviation decisions. Furthermore, this list would have to be kept up-to-date with actual code in the future introducing a huge maintenance burden.

Remove this table from README.md, keep everything else in tact
code_comments.author: gndrmnn
code_comments.resolution: Removed the entire 'Scaffold Deviations from Architecture (CC-0001)' section from README.md, including the heading, introductory paragraph, and the deviation table, while preserving all other README content.

resolution_summary: The deviation log table was removed from README.md as requested, keeping all other content intact. The change only affected README.md, removing the 'Scaffold Deviations from Architecture (CC-0001)' section and its associated table.
